name: planka
title: Planka
description: Elegant Kanban board for project tracking — clean Trello alternative with real-time updates, file attachments, due dates, labels, and team collaboration. Built for teams who value simplicity.

variables.name: PLANKA_SECRET_KEY
variables.label: Secret Key
variables.description: Random secret for session encryption (generate with: openssl rand -base64 36)

variables.name: PLANKA_ADMIN_EMAIL
variables.label: Admin Email
variables.description: Email for the default admin account
